Name: id
Description: Belvo's unique identifier for the current item.

Name: display_name
Description: The full name of the individual that initiated the consent, as provided by the institution.

Name: document_number
Description: The document number (CPF) of the individual.

Name: belvo_institution_name
Description: Belvo's name for the open finance institution that the consent is related to.

Name: institution_display_name
Description: The display name of the banking institution that the consent is related to.

Name: institution_icon_logo
Description: The URL to the banking institution's logo.

Name: belvo_organization_name
Description: The name registered in Belvo of the organization that created the link.

Name: link_id
Description: The Belvo link ID that the consent belongs to.

Name: user_name
Description: The name provided in `consent.identification_info.name` during the initial Widget Access Token Request.

Name: expired_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the consent will expire. In the case that `undefined_consent_expiration` is `true`, this field will be `null`.

Name: undefined_consent_expiration
Description: Indicated whether the consent is for an undefined period, that is, that there is no expiration for the consent.

Name: consent_duration
Description:
The duration of the consent in days. In the case that `undefined_consent_expiration` is `true`, this field will be `null`.

Possible values:
- `92` (3 months)
- `183` (6 months)
- `275` (9 months)
- `366` (12 months)

Name: created_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp of when the data point was created in Belvo's database.

Name: status
Description:
The status of the consent in the open finance network. Can be either:

  - `AUTHORISED`: The consent is still valid for use until the `expired_at` date.
  - `AWAITING_AUTHORISATION_CONFIRMATION`: The user must confirm within their institution.
  - `AWAITING_AUTHORISATION`: The user has been redirected to their institution to grant consent.
  - `REJECTED`: The user has not granted consent within their institution.
  - `EXPIRED`: The consent has expired as of the `expired_at` date.
  - `null`
Enum: AUTHORISED, AWAITING_AUTHORISATION_CONFIRMATION, AWAITING_AUTHORISATION, REJECTED, EXPIRED, None

Name: permissions
Description: Details regarding the permissions attached to the consent.

Name: permissions.ACCOUNTS
Description: A list of of open banking permissions relating to accessing account information.

Name: permissions.CREDIT_CARDS
Description: A list of of open banking permissions relating to accessing credit card information.

Name: permissions.CREDIT_OPERATIONS
Description: A list of of open banking permissions relating to accessing credit product information.

Name: permissions.REGISTER
Description: A list of of open banking permissions relating to accessing personal information.

Name: permissions.RESOURCES
Description: A list of functional permissions required to interact with the permissions.

Name: permissions.INVESTMENTS
Description: A list of open banking permissions relating to accessing investment information.
